channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog mess, 19th May
item.description:
Dog mess outside gate on pavement and road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133a, Melbourne Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 19th May
item.description:
This Mercedes has been abandoned on Sycamore Avenue, DA15 for approximately 3 months. The vehicle is in a state of disrepair with severely damaged wheels and tyres. There is also damage on the inside. This vehicle is obstructing local residents and other members of the public from parking their vehicles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2A, Lime Grove, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox O/S Drive on 105 avenue road Erith, 19th May
item.description:
Dead Fox O/S Drive on 105 avenue road Has been reported already and stating that it has been resolved however resident has called to say dead fox is still there Ref- 9466260
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 19th May
item.description:
Completely blocking pavement. Have to go in road to get past

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Matfield Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has yet again dumped furniture and rubbish, 19th May
item.description:
Someone has dumped a part of a sofa and cushions been ripped open by the bins this is a regular thing and looks disgusting and we don’t like living with all this stuff dumped where people could quite easily call and have it removed ! It’s wrong

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Llanover Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping at Kingsgate Estate bin chamber Buckingham Road, 19th May
item.description:
Flytipping at Kingsgate Estate bin chamber Buckingham Road - being added to daily

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 19th May
item.description:
This car has been here for 3 months probably more. It has no plates and the back window is smashed. It is also parked partially blocking the disabled bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Nursery, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish overflowing in commercial bins, 19th May
item.description:
Bins overflowing, rotten food smell.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Warwick Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 19th May
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

Continued fly tipping at tree

item.title: Missed cleaning & overgown Tree in Abbeyhill park Sidcup, 19th May
item.description:
Missed cleaning & overgrown Tree in Abbeyhill park Sidcup Resident advised there has been a missed section in abbey hill park where bushes are overgrown and trees overgrown etc.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 110, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London

item.title: Furniture and electric items left here, 19th May
item.description:
Reoccurring fly tipping spot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mawbey Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gray bags by trees, 19th May
item.description:
Leave collected in gray bags 3 week ago Left by trees for collection around all 3 streets Hassendean Furzfield & Coulthurst

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hassendean Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree with low hanging branches, 19th May
item.description:
The tree directly outside Kidbrooke Park Primary School has low hanging branches and people have to duck to walk past it on the pavement. It impedes the follow of people at morning and afternoon drop offs and pick ups. Children are pulling at the branches or getting hit by branches if they are carried by their parents. Also bird droppings are collecting on the pavement and being walked into school on shoes.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holburne Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees overhanging in cemetrey, 19th May
item.description:
The trees are starting to come in the garden. Is it possible for someone to come and trim them slightly for us?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Listria Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive flytip, 19th May
item.description:
I have reported this twice over past 2 weeks,and nothing has been done about it It blocks a public footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lindway, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hanging lorry sign, 19th May
item.description:
Lorry sign on end of Barnwell Road is swinging. Please can it be attached.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Barnwell Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped household items, 19th May
item.description:
